reasoning: Improving your lactate clearance is essential given the 25W drop from 5-minute to 20-minute efforts. Your last ride was well below FTP, showing room for intensity. This session builds towards the sustained power needed for the Alpine Loop climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x 12-min over-unders (4-min at 201-218W, 4-min at 242-256W) with 3-min recovery at 50% FTP between efforts

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
